findings.issue: Lack of explicit tone-of-voice guidelines for user-facing text
findings.recommended_fix: Add tone-of-voice principles to the constitution, ensuring shame-free language and adherence to the 7 Tone-of-Voice principles (Tinkoff/Aviasales benchmark)

findings.issue: Some examples do not fully adhere to the banned phrases and vocabulary signature
findings.recommended_fix: Review and revise examples to ensure consistency with the banned phrases and vocabulary signature
